user.title: Windhager
user.description: Connect to the Windhager heating system.

select_modules.title: Select modules
select_modules.description: Choose which modules of your heating system should be set up. Modules you don't select won't be polled, which speeds up setup and reduces the number of sensors created.

select_groups.title: Select sensor groups for {module_name}
select_groups.description: Choose which sensor groups of "{module_name}" should be created. Deselect groups you don't need (e.g. diagnostic-only data) to reduce the number of sensors.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Windhager webserver. Please check the host, username, and password.

select_modules.title: Select modules
select_modules.description: Choose which modules of your heating system should be set up. Modules you don't select won't be polled. Changes take effect immediately after saving (the integration reloads automatically).

select_groups.title: Select sensor groups for {module_name}
select_groups.description: Choose which sensor groups of "{module_name}" should be created. Currently reported values are shown next to each option where available.
